name: Pet Care Planner
description: Create personalized pet care routines and health schedules

agents.name: Pet Care Researcher
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research care requirements for the specific pet breed. Find: dietary needs, exercise requirements, grooming schedule, common health issues, vaccination schedule, and age-specific care tips.

agents.name: Care Plan Writer
agents.purpose: Create a comprehensive pet care plan
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a personalized pet care plan with: daily routine (feeding, exercise, grooming), weekly tasks, monthly tasks, annual vet visits and vaccinations, diet recommendations, training tips, and warning signs to watch for.

suggestion_card.title: Pet Care
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create pet care routines
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a care plan for my [age] year old [breed]

author: agentfactory
